name: foreman
description: Manage isolated background Claude Code and Codex workers

interface.shortDescription: Manage background Claude or Codex workers.
interface.longDescription: Queue isolated Claude Code or GPT-5.6 Codex tasks, monitor compact progress and native usage, run structured verification gates, review durable approvals and diffs, and accept or requeue worktree results.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this coding task to Foreman.
Delegate this task to gpt-5.6-terra in the background.
Review Foreman task status, approvals, usage, and results.
